Furthermore, certificate explicitly references Invoice No: 362944565 and Invoice Date: 16-SEP-2025 matching invoice data, fulfilling general goods description with invoice reference rule (4.3.5).

origin.motivation: Certificate specifies origin as 'European Community, Sweden'. Invoice specifies 'SWEDEN' as Country of Origin. The EU normalization rule applies to allow European Community and Sweden equivalence, matching origin country in invoice (4.5.4.1 and 4.5.4.2).

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All relevant control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, origin) are strictly verified with exact or normalized text matches and explicit invoice references. No mismatches or uncertainties detected.
